general.customBgUrl: Or enter a custom background URL
general.imageCompressionQualityHelp: JPEG compression quality (0.1-1.0). Default is 0.8 to reduce file size when transmitting images to AI models, as we don't compress images during API transmission which could result in large file sizes.
general.imageMaxWidthHelp: Maximum width for image resizing. Images exceeding this width will be proportionally scaled down. Set to 0 for no size limit. This feature exists because some AI models may have limitations when processing very large images. However, most AI models can handle images automatically, so the default is 0 (no restriction) to preserve your original images.

live2d.personaPromptHelp: You can directly edit the final prompt here. Changes apply on the next conversation round.

character.uploadLive2dModelHint: Only .zip is supported. The archive must include a valid .model3.json and related assets.
character.builtinPresetDescription: Built-in personality preset. Tap to switch.
character.customPresetDescription: Custom personality preset. Tap to apply.
character.customPresetManager: Persona Manager (click to edit, trash to delete)
character.personaDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the persona you want in free text.
character.personaDescriptionHelp: Enter your description, then click "Generate Persona Text".
character.generatedPersonaPromptPlaceholder: The generated persona prompt appears here. You can edit it before applying.

stage.avatarActionHint: Tip: If your assets include an action sequence, clicking the character at runtime will trigger it.
stage.avatarUploadHint: Supports png/jpg/jpeg/webp/gif/zip. Prepare assets with the naming rules, then upload them directly or as a zip package.
stage.avatarPackNamePlaceholder: e.g. Math Teacher Xiaoyi / Demo Character A
stage.avatarUploadSupportDesc: Supports single image, image sequence, GIF, and zip packages. Zip contents use the same naming rules as direct uploads.
stage.avatarUploadNamingRules: Naming examples: idle_001.png, listening_001.png, thinking_001.png, speaking_001.png, action_01_001.png. idle is required; listening/thinking/speaking fall back to idle; action can have multiple groups.
stage.avatarDropHint: Drag assets here, or click '+' to choose files
stage.avatarDropSubHint: All assets uploaded under the same custom name belong to one character.
stage.uploadCardDescription: Upload an image to the project background library, then switch to it immediately.
stage.uploadBackgroundDropHint: Drag a background image here, or click '+' to choose a file.

asr.autoStopMic: Auto Stop Mic When AI Start Speaking
asr.autoStopMicDesc: Automatically stops microphone when AI begins speaking to prevent audio feedback
asr.autoStartMicOnConvEnd: Auto Start Mic When Conversation End
asr.autoStartMicOnConvEndDesc: Automatically restarts microphone when AI finishes speaking for seamless conversation
asr.autoStartMicOn: Auto Start Mic When AI Interrupted
asr.autoStartMicOnDesc: Automatically restarts microphone when you interrupt AI for continuous interaction
asr.positiveSpeechThresholdDesc: Minimum confidence level (1-100) required to detect speech. Higher values reduce false positives
asr.negativeSpeechThresholdDesc: Confidence level (0-100) below which speech detection stops. Lower values make detection less sensitive
asr.redemptionFramesDesc: Number of consecutive frames (1-100) needed to confirm speech detection. Higher values reduce noise triggers

tts.engineConfigHelp: Configure engine-specific parameters here. You can switch to any supported TTS engine later.

knowledge.moduleDescription: Upload text materials for pre-answer retrieval. Relevant snippets are injected before response generation.
knowledge.enableForCurrentConversation: Enable knowledge retrieval for this session
knowledge.enableForCurrentConversationHelp: When disabled, this chat session will respond without injecting knowledge snippets.

agent.idleSecondsToSpeak: Idle seconds allow AI to speak
agent.allowButtonTrigger: Prompt AI to Speak via Raise Hand Button
agent.movedToCharacter: These settings have been moved to the Interaction tab.

footer.exitProjectConfirm: Exit and close the project now?

sidebar.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

notification.personaUpdated: Persona updated. It will affect the next conversation round.
notification.knowledgeEnabled: Knowledge retrieval enabled for current session
notification.knowledgeDisabled: Knowledge retrieval disabled for current session

error.cameraApiNotSupported: Camera API is not supported on this device
error.noCameraFound: No camera found on this device
error.insecureMicContext: This page is not a secure context, so the browser will not grant microphone access. Use the Raspberry Pi local page (localhost) or switch to HTTPS.
error.vadMisfire: Voice detected but too brief. Try speaking louder/longer, or adjust settings (lower speech threshold, lower negative threshold, reduce redemption frames).
error.personaNameDuplicate: The persona name "{{name}}" already exists. Please choose another name.
error.personaDescriptionRequired: Please enter a persona description first
error.speechRecognitionNotSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser
error.ttsConfigMustBeObject: TTS config JSON must be an object
error.live2dModelNameDuplicate: The Live2D avatar name "{{name}}" already exists. Rename the zip file and upload again.
error.avatarPackNameDuplicate: The avatar name "{{name}}" already exists. Please choose another name.
error.avatarPackNameRequired: Please enter an avatar name first
error.avatarPackFilesRequired: Please upload at least one asset file

lockOverlay.title: Classroom locked
lockOverlay.description: Please wait for the teacher to unlock this device

login.title: Classroom VTuber
login.userNotFound: Username not found, please create it
login.hint: Create a username on first use; log in with an existing username otherwise
